data.name: 射！就完事了
data.detailed_description:
這是一款輕鬆休閒的消除遊戲。

遊戲總共有10個簡單的祖瑪關卡。

總共可解鎖20個Live2D圖鑑內容。

其中包含10個有聲的Live2D圖鑑內容。
data.about_the_game:
這是一款輕鬆休閒的消除遊戲。

遊戲總共有10個簡單的祖瑪關卡。

總共可解鎖20個Live2D圖鑑內容。

其中包含10個有聲的Live2D圖鑑內容。
data.short_description: 這是一款輕鬆休閒的消除遊戲。簡單的射擊，簡單的關卡，輕鬆享受片刻的寧靜。
data.supported_languages: 英文, 法文, 義大利文, 德文, 西班牙文 - 西班牙, 烏克蘭文, 俄文, 土耳其文, 捷克文, 日文, 波蘭文, 簡體中文, 繁體中文, 葡萄牙文 - 葡萄牙, 韓文

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: Windows 10
  • 處理器: IntelCore i3
  • 記憶體: 1 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: DirectX 9/OpenGL 4.1 capable GPU
  • 儲存空間: 800 MB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: Windows 11
  • 處理器: Intel Core i7
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL ES 2.0 hardware driver support required for WebGL acceleration. (AMD Catalyst 10.9, nVidia 358.50)
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間

data.name: 射！就完事了
data.detailed_description:
This is a relaxing and casual elimination game.

Classic Zuma gameplay:

Balls will gradually roll into the hole. Players can click the left mouse button to fire cannonballs. When three cannonballs of the same color connect, the beads will be eliminated. Once all beads are eliminated, the level is won!

  • There are 10 levels of different difficulty waiting for players to challenge

  • In each level, various limited-time special beads will appear randomly, and the special beads have various skill effects.

Classic Zuma gameplay:

Balls will gradually roll into the hole. Players can click the left mouse button to fire cannonballs. When three cannonballs of the same color connect, the beads will be eliminated. Once all beads are eliminated, the level is won!

  • There are 10 levels of different difficulty waiting for players to challenge

  • In each level, various limited-time special beads will appear randomly, and the special beads have various skill effects.
data.short_description: This is a relaxing, casual match-3 game. Simple shooting, simple levels, and a peaceful escape.
data.supported_languages: English, French, Italian, German, Spanish - Spain, Ukrainian, Russian, Turkish, Czech, Japanese, Polish, Simplified Chinese, Traditional Chinese, Portuguese - Portugal, Korean

pc_requirements.minimum:
Minimum:
  • Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system
  • OS: Windows 10
  • Processor: IntelCore i3
  • Memory: 1 GB RAM
  • Graphics: DirectX 9/OpenGL 4.1 capable GPU
  • Storage: 800 MB available space
pc_requirements.recommended:
Recommended:
  • Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system
  • OS: Windows 11
  • Processor: Intel Core i7
  • Memory: 2 GB RAM
  • Graphics: OpenGL ES 2.0 hardware driver support required for WebGL acceleration. (AMD Catalyst 10.9, nVidia 358.50)
  • Storage: 1 GB available space
